fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. SessionStoreConfig has peek_transcript_range(session_id, start, end) returning only turns in that range. 2. SessionStoreConfig has peek_transcript_window(session_id, target, window) returning a window centered around target. 3. Out-of-bounds ranges are truncated gracefully. 4. Focused unit tests cover range, window, and out-of-bounds peeking.
fields.title: [session-api] Token-efficient transcript range peeking
